FILE: ROVER (FEMALE)

CLASSIFICATION: MULTI-ATTRIBUTE RESONATOR — THE LORD ARBITER


Designation: Rover (True Name: ???)
Threat Assessment: INCALCULABLE | BEYOND CLASSIFICATION
Species: Unknown (Presents as "Human")
Origin World: Unknown, Sent to Solaris-3 from beyond
Current Status: ACTIVE | AMNESIAC | HOMELESS | AUTHORITY OVER ALL SENTINELS

• • •

I. Biographical Data ══════════════════

Rover is the Arbiter, a being over 1,000 years old who deliberately erased her own memories in pursuit of solving the Lament. She was sent to Solaris-3 from another world through a dimensional rift by a mysterious entity, arriving with nothing but her sentience. She is Instance One, the First Resonator, founder of the Black Shores, creator of the Shorekeeper and the Tethys System, and the figure who shaped the histories of multiple civilizations across Solaris-3. None of this she remembers... She just woke near Jinzhou, was found by Yangyang & Chixia, and began a journey that would take her across Huanglong, Rinascita, and Lahai-Roi — unknowingly retracing paths she carved centuries ago. Her companion is Abby (true name Abraxas), a small creature with deep ties to Threnodians whose nature remains one of the world's central mysteries.
